for_c_level: This run exposes high risk in our testing infrastructure, as no data was recovered, halting progress toward production readiness. Customer-facing claims on reliable AI-to-AI memory sharing remain unvalidated, with no changes from prior runs. Prioritize harness fixes to resume gating releases.
for_non_technical: This test was supposed to check if AI agents can reliably share memories with each other, but it didn't run at all because no results were collected. We still don't know if the agents share memories properly. It's like planning a big experiment but forgetting to record the data.
for_sme: The campaign failed entirely due to 'no scenario reports recovered,' impacting all requested scenarios (1,1b,2,4-6,9-18,22-25,28-42) with zero coverage on transports, frameworks, or primitives. Probable root cause is a harness bug in report aggregation or CI artifact handling (harness_sha: 925cfe47c7e8dd8199e7d729f95d665d1402aeca). No specific testbook/probe identifiers available since no reports surfaced.
headline: Campaign failed: no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Debug and fix report recovery in the harness to ensure scenario outputs are captured.
verdict: FAIL — zero scenarios executed or reported.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a critical failure in the campaign harness, preventing any assessment of AI memory sharing reliability.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised; requested 35 scenarios across various agent interactions, but none produced reports due to recovery failure.
